name: Northside Imports LLC
description_short: Northside Imports LLC is a Pittsburgh-area used car dealership specializing in pre-owned European vehicles (BMW, Mercedes-Benz) with bank financing assistance and an in-house service department.
description_long:
Northside Imports LLC is a used car dealership operating out of 718–720 Ohio River Blvd in the Bellevue neighborhood of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. The business has a BBB file dating to May 7, 2013, and is owned by Michael Petitta. The dealership is not BBB accredited and currently holds no BBB rating due to insufficient information on file. Staff collectively claim over 56 years of combined used car sales experience. The dealership operates locally in the greater Pittsburgh metro area and is not a financial services company — it does not issue loans, repair credit, or provide debt counseling.

Northside Imports sells pre-owned vehicles across a range of makes, with a particular emphasis on European brands such as BMW and Mercedes-Benz. Inventory also includes Tesla, Honda, Ford, Chevrolet, Hyundai, and other makes. Vehicle prices in current listings range from approximately $9,500 to $49,999 and above depending on the model and condition. The dealership offers bank financing assistance to buyers — they connect customers with third-party lenders rather than issuing in-house financing. Warranties are offered on sold vehicles. They also operate a "We Buy Cars" program, purchasing vehicles directly from private sellers.

What sets Northside Imports apart from larger chain dealerships is its boutique, relationship-driven approach. Owner Mike Petitta is frequently cited by name in customer reviews across Google, SureCritic, and Facebook, suggesting hands-on ownership involvement in daily operations. Every vehicle is reportedly fully serviced before being listed for sale. The dealership maintains a 5.0/5 rating on Google from 73 reviews, 4.9/5 on both Kelley Blue Book and SureCritic (110 reviews), and a 96% recommendation rate on Facebook from 44 reviewers — a notably consistent cross-platform reputation for a small independent dealer.

Northside Imports is best suited for Pittsburgh-area buyers seeking quality pre-owned vehicles, particularly European makes, who value a smaller, owner-operated dealership over a large franchise lot. The main limitations are geographic (Pittsburgh-area only), lack of a mobile app or self-service customer portal, no confirmed manufacturer CPO certification, no BBB rating, and no money-back guarantee found in public information. Buyers who need financing should expect the dealership to facilitate bank loans rather than offering competitive in-house rates.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee found in public information. Warranties are offered on vehicles sold — contact provider for specific warranty terms.

pros: Consistent 5.0/5 Google rating across 73 reviews — rare for an independent used car dealer
4.9/5 on both Kelley Blue Book and SureCritic (110 reviews), showing cross-platform consistency
Owner Michael Petitta is hands-on and personally cited by name in numerous customer reviews
All vehicles fully serviced before sale, with warranties offered on purchases
In-house service department with diagnostic and repair equipment — buyers can return for maintenance
Staff with 56+ years of combined used car sales experience
Strong European pre-owned inventory (BMW, Mercedes-Benz) uncommon at small independents
cons: Strictly local — serves greater Pittsburgh area only, no remote purchasing process confirmed
Not BBB accredited and holds no BBB rating due to insufficient information on file
Financing is facilitated through third-party banks, not in-house — buyers with poor credit may face limited options
No mobile app and no confirmed self-service customer portal for managing purchases or service appointments
No money-back guarantee found in public information
best_for: Pittsburgh-area buyers seeking quality pre-owned European vehicles (BMW, Mercedes-Benz)
Buyers who prefer a small owner-operated dealership over a large franchise lot
Individuals looking to sell their vehicle through a reputable local 'We Buy Cars' program
Buyers who want post-sale service at the same dealership through an in-house repair department
diagnosis: Northside Imports LLC is best for Pittsburgh-area consumers shopping for pre-owned vehicles — particularly European makes — who value a highly-rated, owner-operated dealership with transparent customer service. The main caveat is that this is a local used car dealer, not a financial services provider; CreditDoc visitors seeking loans, credit repair, or debt relief will not find those services here.
services: Pre-owned vehicle sales (European and other makes)
Tesla, Honda, Ford, Chevrolet, and Hyundai pre-owned inventory
Bank financing assistance for vehicle purchases
We Buy Cars — vehicle purchasing from private sellers
In-house vehicle service and repair department
Online inventory browsing via dealership website
